action.reasoning: Observation: shift TTA hurt hidden balanced accuracy (0.7580) versus the best uniform 9-member ConvNeXt ensemble (0.7668). Probability averaging, prior calibration, validation weighting, CLIP members, and extra weak ConvNeXt members also hurt, so the best known checkpoint remains checkpoints/ensemble9_ep3.pt. Analysis: remaining time is enough for at most one or two targeted attempts, but before editing or launching another model family I need the exact current train/predict implementation and checkpoint metadata because the current workspace view is truncated. Decision: perform a compact read-only inspection of train.py/model.py/predict.py and ensemble metadata, then either train a safer diverse ResNet/ConvNeXt variant or finalize the known-best checkpoint.
